creator: ruben@rubenkerkhof.com
text:
For both directions?

I've tried
pass in quick proto tcp from 84.22.102.2/32 to any port = 22 flags S keep state keep frags but that didn't help.

By the way, I've been looking for documentation about keep frags and noticed a typo in the manpage at https://github.com/freebsd/freebsd/blob/master/contrib/ipfilter/man/ipf.5#L884
